subcodes.first_line: O wayfarer of the horizons! In the path of the Covenant, in every land and region that thou didst traverse, all proclaimed their praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سیاح آفاق در سبیل میثاق بهر بوم و بر که مرور نمودی عموم ستایش نمودند و
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
